title: OmniProject dashboard preset
description: A ready-made, role-tailored "what needs me today" dashboard. One file per preset under assets/dashboard-presets/<id>.json. Each preset assembles EXISTING widget `type`s (assets/widgets) into a layout; applying it mints a fresh dashboard for the user. Presets read through the existing read-model widgets only — no new write paths.

id.description: Unique preset id; equals the filename.

role.description: The role persona this preset is tailored to (drives the suggested default).

name.description: The dashboard name minted when the preset is applied.

summary.description: One line describing the "what needs me today" lens, shown in the preset picker.

order.description: Display order in the preset picker.

widgets.description: The placed widgets, in order. Each `type` MUST be a real widget type (assets/widgets) — enforced by the preset-coverage guard.

type.description: A widget type from the widget catalogue.

span.description: Column span (1–3); defaults to the widget's defaultSpan when omitted.

title.description: Optional override title for this placed widget.
